title: ChatGPT Work：每天自动找选题，等你批准后再生产
product_promise: Make a reviewable content-factory loop understandable in one mobile watch, with real-world footage where actions replace abstractions.

beats.entry_visual: Warm paper card and full hook copy are visible from frame zero.
beats.visual_reason: The light editorial cover establishes the series identity before the visual mode changes.
beats.camera_or_motion: Frame-driven title rise and underline reveal.
beats.sound_cue: Narration and minimal score begin immediately.
beats.transition_out: The paper card clears into a real-world phone insert.

beats.entry_visual: A real phone-scrolling action appears beneath a compact warm headline card.
beats.visual_reason: A physical research action communicates repetition faster than another abstract workflow card.
beats.camera_or_motion: Licensed vertical insert with a restrained scale settle and fixed typography.
beats.asset_provenance: Pexels video 6271585 by www.kaboompics.com; license and hashes recorded 2026-07-15.
beats.sound_cue: Source audio remains muted under narration and music.
beats.transition_out: Clean cut from real action to the operating-principle comparison.
beats.fallback: Warm Remotion card listing the repeated research loop.

beats.entry_visual: The keep/remove comparison headline and both lanes are visible.
beats.visual_reason: The split comparison makes the human judgment boundary scannable.
beats.camera_or_motion: Cards enter in sequence from a fixed grid.
beats.asset_provenance: Remotion-native comparison cards using verified copy.
beats.sound_cue: The second card lands on the narration contrast.
beats.transition_out: Comparison clears before source research begins.

beats.entry_visual: A real research page on a laptop is already visible beneath the source-research headline.
beats.visual_reason: The real action bridges from principle to source-backed production.
beats.camera_or_motion: Licensed vertical insert with fixed crop and subtle scale settle.
beats.asset_provenance: Pexels video 38496194 by Media Hopper Studio; license and hashes recorded 2026-07-15.
beats.transition_out: The research action clears into the actual official source screenshot.
beats.fallback: Official documentation screenshot in the following beat.

beats.entry_visual: Official OpenAI documentation appears inside the light source frame.
beats.visual_reason: The actual source distinguishes verified product behavior from illustrative B-roll.
beats.asset_provenance: Official OpenAI ChatGPT Learn screenshot captured 2026-07-15.
beats.sound_cue: Music stays quiet under the source label.
beats.transition_out: Source frame clears before the human approval gate.
beats.fallback: Source title, claims, and official URL on a static card.

beats.entry_visual: A large editorial gate is immediately visible with a waiting state.
beats.visual_reason: The choice makes the creator's judgment role concrete.
beats.camera_or_motion: Subtle breathing scale only; controls remain stable.
beats.sound_cue: Music opens slightly around the held decision.
beats.transition_out: Approval card yields to the production workflow.

beats.entry_visual: Production headline and the first reviewable file contract are visible.
beats.visual_reason: Named files make the content factory inspectable instead of magical.
beats.camera_or_motion: Four stable rows reveal in sequence.
beats.asset_provenance: Remotion-native workflow representing repository file contracts.
beats.sound_cue: The fourth row resolves with the narration phrase.
beats.transition_out: Clean cut into the second approval gate.

beats.entry_visual: The publish gate is visible with QA as the pending decision.
beats.visual_reason: The second gate prevents the workflow from implying unattended publishing.
beats.camera_or_motion: Stable approval card with restrained breathing scale.
beats.transition_out: The card clears before the final principle.

beats.entry_visual: The final principle and Aaron identity are visible on the light editorial grid.
beats.visual_reason: The ending converts the tutorial into a reusable operating principle.
beats.transition_out: End on the complete statement, not black.
